name: audit-lead-radar
description: Recommend Korean audit-sales target companies by combining OpenDART auditor signals with firm-side personnel, relationship, and ERP/CRM context.

interface.shortDescription: Recommend audit-sales targets from OpenDART and firm context.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for ERP/CRM-integrated audit lead research. It uses OpenDART public disclosures to identify a company's current auditor, recent auditor history, consecutive auditor tenure, likely periodic designation or free-appointment timing, and sales-fit signals from configured firm personnel, industry expertise, relationship coverage, and target-account context.
defaultPrompt: OpenDART 기반 감사인 지정 타이밍을 분석해줘.
